Class LeaderCard

java.lang.Object
NonGui.BaseEntity.LeaderCard
All Implemented Interfaces:
HaveClass
Direct Known Subclasses:
Darius, Garen, Ryze, Soraka, Teemo, Zed
public class LeaderCard extends Object implements HaveClass
Represents a Leader Card in the game. Each player owns one Leader Card which dictates their starting class and provides unique passive abilities or team synergies.

  • Constructor Summary

  • Constructor Details

    • LeaderCard

      public LeaderCard(String name, String flavorText, UnitClass unitClass)
      Constructs a new LeaderCard with the specified details. Note: abilityDescription can be set separately using its setter.
      Parameters:
      name - The name of the leader.
      flavorText - The lore or background text for the leader.
      unitClass - The specific class (UnitClass) this leader belongs to.

  • Method Details

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns the string representation of the Leader Card. * @return The name of the leader.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object

    • getUnitClass

      public UnitClass getUnitClass()
      Gets the unit class of this leader. Overridden from the haveClass interface. * @return The UnitClass of the leader.
      Specified by:
      getUnitClass in interface HaveClass
      Returns:
      The current UnitClass assigned to this entity.

    • setUnitClass

      public void setUnitClass(UnitClass unitClass)
      Sets the unit class of this leader. Overridden from the haveClass interface. * @param unitClass The new UnitClass to assign.
      Specified by:
      setUnitClass in interface HaveClass
      Parameters:
      unitClass - The new UnitClass to assign.
